name: Mrs Fields' Chocolate Chip Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine flour and baking powder. Mix well with wire whisk and set aside.
3. In a large bowl, blend sugars using an electric mixer at medium speed. Add butter and mix until grainy, scraping down the sides of the bowl. Add eggs and vanilla and mix at medium speed until smooth.
4. Gradually add the flour mixture, raisins, and chocolate chips to the sugar mixture. Blend at low speed until just combined.
5. Drop rounded tablespoons of dough onto ungreased baking sheets, 1-1/2 inches apart.
6. Bake for 22-24 minutes. Transfer cookies immediately to a cool, flat surface.
